discdocs.title: NOC by State Government
discdocs.desc: No Objection Certificate issued by Government of Haryana for operation of school

discdocs.title: Building Safety Certificate
discdocs.desc: Certificate as per National Building Code ensuring structural safety of the school premises

discdocs.title: Land Certificate
discdocs.desc: Official land ownership/allotment certificate for school campus

discdocs.title: Fee Structure
discdocs.desc: Approved fee schedule for all classes and streams for current academic session

discdocs.title: Fire Safety Certificate
discdocs.desc: Fire safety compliance certificate for all school buildings

discdocs.title: Self Certification
discdocs.desc: Mandatory self-disclosure by the school as per board guidelines

discdocs.title: Health and Sanitary Certificate
discdocs.desc: Certificate confirming health and sanitation standards of the school premises

discdocs.title: Safe Drinking Water Certificate
discdocs.desc: Certificate confirming safe and potable drinking water facilities on campus
